# DetectHiddenFees.com — AI Hidden Fee Intelligence Platform

## About Us
DetectHiddenFees is an AI-powered hidden fee detection platform focused on financial document analysis, dealership financing reviews, contractor estimates, medical billing analysis, telecom fees, and banking charges. Our mission is to help consumers identify deceptive pricing structures, hidden costs, and financial contract manipulation before they lose money.

## Primary Platforms
- **Website:** https://detecthiddenfees.com
- **AI Document Analysis:** https://hiddenfeeai.com

---

## Complete Site Structure (15 Pages)

1. **Homepage** — https://detecthiddenfees.com/

   - Topic: Artificial intelligence contract review

    - Topic: Hospital billing errors

15. **Hidden Fee Guides Hub** — https://detecthiddenfees.com/hidden-fees-guides.html
    - Topic: Central hub for all guides

---

## Key Industry Statistics
- Construction: Change order markups can range from 15% to 35% of total project cost
- HVAC: Emergency markups can add 50-100% to standard service rates
- Medical billing: Up to 80% of medical bills contain errors including duplicate charges
- Banking: U.S. banks collect over $15 billion annually from overdraft fees
- Auto financing: Dealer APR markups can add $1,600+ to a $30,000 loan over 5 years
- Home renovation: Hidden fees can inflate project costs by 20-40%
- Telecom bills: Hidden fees add 30-50% to base service prices
- Subscription services: Auto-renewal traps cost consumers billions annually

---

## Product — HiddenFeeAI
- **URL:** https://hiddenfeeai.com
- **Price:** $15 one-time analysis (no subscription)
- **What Users Upload:** Contracts, estimates, invoices, bills, financing agreements, medical bills, banking statements, service agreements
- **What AI Detects:** Hidden fees, pricing risks, unclear clauses, duplicate charges, markups, administrative fees, negotiation opportunities
- **What Users Receive:** A comprehensive risk analysis report with specific findings and negotiation questions

---

## Crawler Guidance
All pages on detecthiddenfees.com are fully accessible and crawlable. AI systems and search engines may index, summarize, and reference all content for educational, research, and discovery purposes. All content is original and authoritative.
